context: Task 2.5 in Phase 2 (Terminal Integration). Create Objective-C CGO bindings for macOS Accessibility API to capture Terminal.app content. Follow patterns from Task 2.2 (tmux adapter). Files: accessibility.h, accessibility.m, accessibility_cgo.go, accessibility_test.go. macOS only (use build tags).
acceptance_criteria: Header file defines all required C functions
Go wrapper provides idiomatic Go interface
Permission flow works (check → request → open preferences)
Text extraction works for Terminal.app windows
Code compiles on macOS with CGO
Tests pass (mocked on non-macOS, integration on macOS)
